markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, production, and new AI visibility tools.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Validated:** The current focus on AdLumen and full-stack topics is correct for N-able's cyber resiliency pivot. Future priority will shift to Cove (backup/DR) to build market awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**New Content Format:** GrowthX will draft a listicle to demonstrate the format's value for AI citation, which is now critical for appearing in evaluation-level search prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Editorial Process Clarified:** The workflow for approving blog topics was defined: N-able reviews topics in the "Considering" column, and GrowthX moves approved ones to "Approve to Start."](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:** N-able will review the "Check that" tool to validate its tracked prompts, ensuring it accurately measures relevant AI citations for internal reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Current Mix:** Heavy focus on AdLumen (6 blogs) and full-stack topics (5 blogs) to support the company's cyber resiliency pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Future Focus:** Shift priority to Cove (backup/DR) over UEM.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The market knows N-able for UEM but not for security or Cove. This shift aims to build awareness in new, strategic areas.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**Performance:** AdLumen content has lower traffic, which is expected for a new product cluster. Traffic is projected to grow as more content is published and market education increases.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Editorial Process & Feedback

  - [**MDR Topics:** Jen (Security PMM) provided feedback on some MDR topics.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will address feedback on specific topics and move all others to "Approve to Start" to begin production.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Product Descriptions:** UEM team feedback requested more dynamic product descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Problem:** Repetitive, generic descriptions (e.g., "N-Central... automation scripts") are used across all blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Solution:** Frame product references to the specific article's topic (e.g., network segmentation) for greater relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)

### New Content Format: Listicles for AI Citation

  - [**Problem:** ChatGPT frequently cites biased listicles from competitors (e.g., SentinelOne, Acronis) as authoritative sources for evaluation-level prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Rationale for Adoption:** This format is now a necessity to compete for AI citation, despite internal reservations.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Key Finding:** Listicles with a balanced view (including drawbacks) are more likely to be cited. This provides a strategic angle for N-able to offer a valuable, critical perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### AI Visibility Tool: "Check that"

  - [**Purpose:** Track AI citations and prompt performance to demonstrate value to internal teams.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [**Action:** N-able to review the tool's tracked prompts to ensure they are relevant and accurate for measuring success.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Partnership Health Check

  - [**N-able Feedback:** The partnership is meeting expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [**Primary Blocker:** Internal N-able processes and lack of focus, not GrowthX's performance.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**GrowthX Feedback:** Traffic is increasing immediately with each new blog, creating strong momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
      - [Draft a listicle example for internal N-able review.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
      - [Address Jen's feedback on MDR topics and move approved ones to "Approve to Start."](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
      - [Implement more dynamic product descriptions in future content.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [**N-able:**](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
      - [Review prompts in the "Check that" tool to validate relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/JHRAnKwR9myTbxgGVHN3DFVWHZJ-Lt1X?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
